lede: A look at September 8 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Antonín Dvořák and Alfred Jarry, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Elizabeth II
events.desc: Queen Elizabeth II of the United Kingdom dies at Balmoral Castle in Scotland after reigning for 70 years. Her son Charles, Prince of Wales, ascends the throne upon her death as Charles III.

events.title: Watergate scandal
events.desc: Watergate scandal: US President Gerald Ford signs the pardon of Richard Nixon for any crimes Nixon may have committed while in office.

events.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
events.desc: The landmark American science fiction television series Star Trek premieres with its first-aired episode, "The Man Trap".

events.title: Huey Long
events.desc: US Senator from Louisiana Huey Long is fatally shot in the Louisiana State Capitol building.

events.title: 1900 Galveston hurricane
events.desc: Galveston hurricane: A powerful hurricane hits Galveston, Texas killing about 8,000 people.

events.title: William IV
events.desc: William IV and Adelaide of Saxe-Meiningen are crowned King and Queen of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland.

events.title: French Revolutionary Wars
events.desc: French Revolutionary Wars: Battle of Hondschoote.

events.title: French and Indian War
events.desc: French and Indian War: Battle of Lake George.

events.title: St. Augustine, Florida
events.desc: St. Augustine, Florida is founded by Spanish admiral and Florida's first governor, Pedro Menéndez de Avilés.

births.name: Emperor Xuanzong of Tang
births.line: Emperor of the Tang dynasty from 713 to 756

births.name: Asha Bhosle
births.line: Indian playback singer, businesswoman, actress and television personality

births.name: Frédéric Mistral
births.line: French poet and lexicographer, Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: Elizabeth II, Queen of the United Kingdom and other Commonwealth realms
Leni Riefenstahl, German actress, director, producer, and screenwriter
Hermann Staudinger, German chemist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate

observances.text: Christian Feast Day: Adrian and Natalia of Nicomedia (Roman Catholic Church)
Christian Feast Day: Nativity of Mary (Roman Catholic Church), (Anglo-Catholicism) Monti Fest (Mangalorean Catholic)
Christian Feast Day: Our Lady of Charity
Christian Feast Day: Our Lady of Covadonga (national holiday in Asturias)
Christian Feast Day: Our Lady of Good Health of Vailankanni
